title: Nato ready to defend ‘every inch’ of territory as Russian drone hits Romania
summary_full: Mark Rutte says Moscow’s ‘reckless behaviour is a danger to us all’ after drone hit apartments during attack on UkraineEurope live – latest updatesThe Nato secretary general, Mark Rutte, has said the alliance is “ready to defend every inch” of its territory after a Russian drone hit an apartment building in Romania, a member state, during an overnight attack on neighbouring Ukraine.The incident in Galați, which injured two people, prompted swift condemnation and the threat of repercussions. Continue reading...
